---
id: domain.contract
type: spec
status: draft
domain: domain
summary: Defines one normative Aobus behavior contract.
---
# Specification title

## Scope

State the behavior this specification owns and what it delegates.

## Code boundary

Link the system architecture and owning subsystem architecture.
Name the owning layer and relevant public and implementation paths without redefining the layer model.

## Terminology

Define domain terms whose meaning is required by the contract.

## Invariants

List rules that must always hold.

## State model

Define states and durable state variables when applicable.

## Commands and transitions

Define preconditions, state transitions, ordering, and postconditions.

## Failure and cancellation

Define observable failure, atomicity, retry, and cancellation behavior.

## Persistence and versioning

Define persistence semantics and link the exact serialized reference.

## Frontend observations

Define frontend-neutral observable state and delegated rendering policy.

## Implementation map

Link stable symbols and source locations without restating implementation code.

## Test map

Link behavior tests and identify the contracts they prove.

## Related documents

Link architecture, reference, and decisions owned elsewhere.
